source_intake_record.raw_question_text:

Choices are only labels (A-E), so the option content must be recovered from the image.
multi_step: The task requires evaluating a candidate shape placement on the board and then checking that none of the other four remaining shapes can fit afterward.
This implies at least two linked reasoning steps: choose a placement-compatible shape, then eliminate all other options by future fit analysis.
There are 5 candidate choices, suggesting comparative evaluation across multiple alternatives.

registry_passed=true and answer_present=true, so core assets are registered.
